summary: Phase 9 Testing: New Features for Stick Pro - Roller Hockey Team Management. All 4 new features tested and working correctly. Backend: 14/14 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.

user_role_management.description: Admin can change user roles via dropdown in PlayerProfile page. Dropdown shows all 6 roles: Administrador, Treinador, Treinador Adjunto, Delegado, Jogador, Responsável. Current role marked as 'Atual'. Confirmation dialog appears before role change.

messages_recipient_selection.description: Chat page has 'Enviar para:' dropdown with options 'Toda a equipa' (broadcast) and 'Membro específico' (private). When 'Membro específico' selected, second dropdown appears to select team member. Private messages marked with 'Privada' badge.

match_lineup_editor.description: Line-up button appears in championship match actions. Opens dialog with hockey rink SVG visual showing 5 positions (GR, DE, DD, AE, AD). Period navigation with '1ª Parte', '2ª Parte' buttons. '+ Período' button to add new periods. Player selection panel shows available players with position badges.

mobile_menu_club_settings.description: 'Definições Clube' link visible in mobile sidebar menu for admin users. Mobile menu opens via hamburger icon in header. All navigation links properly displayed.

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed messages created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 features fully functional: 1) User Role Management - Admin dropdown in PlayerProfile to change member roles, 2) Messages with recipient selection - 'Enviar para' dropdown with 'Toda a equipa' and 'Membro específico' options, 3) Match Line-up Editor - Hockey rink visual with 5 positions and period navigation, 4) Mobile Menu - 'Definições Clube' link visible for admin users. Championship ID for testing: 71567ba7-16b6-432e-9994-93dc9d8cc3bb
